title: Bucketsink
description: A simple quality-of-life modpack for Minecraft that contains a wide range of mods and resource packs to help improve the overall playability without taking away from the vanilla experience!
body:
# What is Bucketsink? Bucketsink provides the quintessential client-side modded Minecraft experience. It's a simple **quality-of-life modpack** for Minecraft that contains a wide range of mods and resource packs to help improve the overall playability without taking away from the vanilla experience. This modpack will improve the ** Performance, Visuals, Models, while adding to overall game immersion!** ## Installation - **Modrinth App:** You can download and play the modpack directly in the official [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) - **Third-party Launcher:** To install and play the modpack with the .mrpack file, follow the instructions [here.](https://docs.modrinth.com/docs/modpacks/playing_modpacks/) ## Compatibility This modpack is compatible with almost any vanilla Minecraft server of the same/similar version.

### FAQ With Bucketsink every mod included is customizable to your liking. If you don't want a mod enabled or you want to change how one of them works look into the mods list in-game to tailor them to your specific needs!
